data.label: 1. Plan
data.description: Define business value and requirements using Agile methodologies.

data.label: 2. Code
data.description: Develop code and manage it using version control systems like Git.

data.label: 3. Build
data.description: Compile source code into runnable artifacts using CI servers like Jenkins or GitHub Actions.

data.label: 4. Test
data.description: Ensure quality with automated tests (Unit, Integration, E2E).

data.label: 5. Release
data.description: Prepare and version the build artifact for deployment.

data.label: 6. Deploy
data.description: Automate deployment to production using Infrastructure as Code (IaC).

data.label: 7. Operate
data.description: Manage and maintain the application in production, often using container orchestration like Kubernetes.

data.label: 8. Monitor
data.description: Collect data and logs to provide feedback and enable continuous improvement.
